command:
curl -s 'https://www.hyo.world/data/feed.json' 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
print(f'Live feed: {len(data.get(\"reports\",[]))} reports, {len(data.get(\"agents\",{}))} agents')
for r in data.get('reports',[]):
    print(f'  {r[\"id\"]} | {r[\"author\"]}')
"
